issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which indicates the effect applies for the remainder of the current turn only. Should use duration:'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. 'EndOfTurn' implies the effect persists until end of turn and then explicitly ends, while 'DuringYourTurn' correctly captures the temporary duration within the turn.

Target uses 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but card text specifies 'up to 1' meaning the effect is optional. Should use a target modifier indicating optional selection, or verify ChooseOpponentCharacter already handles 'up to' semantics.
